texto: Even when reading is impossible, the presence of books acquired produces such an ecstasy that the buying of more books than one can read is nothing less than the soul reaching towards infinity... We cherish books even if unread, their mere presence exudes comfort, their ready access reassurance.
explicacao: Citação de A.E. Newton sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Even when reading is impossible, the presence of books acquired produces such an ecstasy that the…” articula reflexao, abibliophobia, books em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como books e reading.
